case_title: OLIVEROS, ANGEL V. vs. ST JUDE STRESS MANAGEMENT & HOLISTIC CLINIC A CORP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLIVEROS, ANGEL V. AS TO DEFENDANT ST JUDE STRESS MANAGEMENT & HOLISTIC CLINIC A CORP
